restaurantPage.title: Restaurant
restaurantPage.description:
Our restaurant offers fresh, locally-sourced meals with a blend of Western and Indonesian dishes.
We can accommodate dietary needs like vegan, vegetarian, lactose-free, and gluten-free.
restaurantPage.hours: Open daily from 7:00 AM to 10:00 PM

info.title: Important Information
info.description:
All of our treks start at 9:00 AM and include entrance to Gunung Leuser National Park, certified English-speaking guide services, and a return journey by traditional rafting, with a group size of a minimum of 2 to 6 persons.

For overnight treks, your trip includes a team that will set up a jungle campsite by the river, complete with a mosquito net, sleeping mat, blankets, and a personal cook to prepare your meals.
info.whatToBringDetails:
Sport or hiking shoes, comfortable hiking clothes, swimwear, and a towel.
For overnight stays, pack long clothes, a jacket, a flashlight, and flip-flops.
Optional items include a hat, sunglasses, insect repellent, sunscreen, and a raincoat.

massage.name: Massage
massage.description: Enjoy a relaxing session after your trek. The traditional massage helps release tension and restore your energy and sense of well-being.

cooking.name: Cooking Class
cooking.description: Discover the flavors of Sumatra and learn to cook traditional dishes using fresh ingredients from the daily market. Explore a variety of vegetables, herbs, and spices, and learn how to prepare and combine them. After the class, relax and enjoy the meal you’ve cooked.

details.dishes: Choose 2 dishes from: Gado-gado, Asam Manis, Kari, Semur, Sate, and Sambal.
details.options: Vegetarian and vegan options are available.

village.name: Village Tour
village.description: Explore the village by becak (traditional motorbike with a sidecar) or by bicycle to see rice paddies, fruit and vegetable plantations, and the traditional production of brown sugar and tofu. Finish your trip with a delicious lunch in the rice fields while enjoying a refreshing fresh coconut.

night.name: Night Trek
night.description: Experience the jungle after dark! During this night trek, you’ll have the chance to spot animals that are hard to see during the day, as they usually hide from the heat and sunlight. You might encounter snakes, scorpions, centipedes, frogs, lizards, and other fascinating nocturnal creatures.

flower.name: Flower Trip
flower.description: A nature escape in search of rare flowers such as the Rafflesia or the Titan Arum. This trip is only possible when a flower is blooming nearby — as their appearance is random, please contact us to check current availability.

transfers.title: Transfers
transfers.pleaseSelect: Please select a destination to view available transfers.
